title: Link sequence API implementation does not match header
description: The public header declares int lichen_link_next_seq(struct lichen_link_ctx *ctx, uint16_t *seqnum), but link_ctx.c defines uint16_t lichen_link_next_seq(struct lichen_link_ctx *ctx) and then dereferences an undeclared seqnum. Trigger: compile any caller such as lichen_link_tx(), which calls lichen_link_next_seq(ctx, &seqnum). Bad behavior: conflicting types / too many arguments / undeclared identifier prevent the link layer from building. Locations: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/include/lichen/link_ctx.h:108-113 and lichen/subsys/lichen/link/link_ctx.c:148-164.
close_reason: Fixed lichen_link_next_seq definition to match public header and caller API
